# Georgios Balaouras Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Georgios Balaouras, a Machine Learning Engineer based in Thessaloniki, Greece. Specializes in building ML systems, multi-agent AI, and data pipelines with expertise in Deep Learning, Transformers, and Attention Mechanisms.

## About

I am a Machine Learning Engineer with experience in both academic research and enterprise-scale ML deployment. My background spans from deep learning research at CERTH-ITI to building production ML systems at EY and Kaizen Gaming.

Key expertise:
- Deep Learning & Transformers
- Multi-agent AI Systems
- Video Analysis & Summarization
- Natural Language Processing
- Cloud-based ML Pipelines (Azure, Databricks)
- Python, PyTorch, FastAPI

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/): Personal introduction and professional summary
- [Experience](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/#experience): Career timeline with detailed role descriptions
- [Publications](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/publications): Research papers on video summarization using attention mechanisms
- [Projects](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/projects): Portfolio of machine learning and software projects
- [Formula 1](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/formula): F1 statistics and interactive widgets

## Publications

Research papers on video summarization and attention mechanisms:

- [Combining Global and Local Attention with Positional Encoding for Video Summarization (ISM 2021)](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/publications/ism2021/): A supervised self-attention-based method for automated video summarization using global and local multi-head attention mechanisms with positional encoding. Published at IEEE International Symposium on Multimedia (ISM) 2021.

- [AC-SUM-GAN: Connecting Actor-Critic and Generative Adversarial Networks for Unsupervised Video Summarization (ICMR 2022)](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/publications/icmr2022/): An unsupervised video summarization approach combining Actor-Critic reinforcement learning with Generative Adversarial Networks. Published at ACM International Conference on Multimedia Retrieval (ICMR) 2022.

- [Summarizing Video Content with Attention-Based Mechanisms (ISM 2022)](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/publications/ism2022/): Comprehensive study of attention mechanisms for video summarization tasks. Published at IEEE International Symposium on Multimedia (ISM) 2022.

## Projects

Selected machine learning and software engineering projects:

- [Thesis: Energy Consumption Analysis of Mobile Phones](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/projects/thesis): Data collection and analysis of smartphone energy consumption patterns using machine learning techniques, including XGBoost models for energy drain prediction.

- [JPEG Compression Analysis](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/projects/JPEG): Implementation and analysis of JPEG image compression algorithm, exploring DCT quantization and Huffman encoding.

- [Image Segmentation](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/projects/image-segmentation): Computer vision project implementing various image segmentation techniques including thresholding and clustering methods.

- [Optimization Algorithms](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/projects/optimization-algorithms): Implementation and comparison of various optimization algorithms for machine learning and numerical computing.

- [Bashic Shell](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/projects/bashic-shell): Custom Unix shell implementation in C with support for pipes, redirections, and background processes.

- [Pi Messenger](https://mpalaourg-astro.pages.dev/mpalaourg-astro/projects/pi-messenger): Real-time messaging application with end-to-end encryption capabilities.
